arts.ttl: Germany vs. Netherlands: UEFA Nations League probable teams, stats and LIVE blog!
arts.sum: The side seamlessly shook off the injury absence of several key players in a 2-1 win in Bosnia on Friday, with Deniz Undav netting two goals from the number 10 position and Tim Kleindienst leading the line well while having a strike disallowed. After a Deniz Undav brace brought a win in Bosnia, Julian Nagelsmann must consider whether to finetune his Germany side as they target a key win over the Netherlands in Munich on Monday (kick-off: 8.45pm CEST).
